title: Replace Browser confirm() with In-Game Modals
summary: Replace 3 native browser confirm() dialogs with styled in-game modal components that match the game aesthetic.

tasks.description: Add a reusable showConfirmModal(message, onConfirm) function. Add modal HTML to index.html and CSS styling. Replace all 3 confirm() calls.
acceptance_criteria: No browser confirm() dialogs appear anywhere in the game
In-game modal appears with message and Confirm/Cancel buttons
Modal is styled to match game aesthetic (dark theme, green accents)
Clicking Cancel dismisses modal without action
Clicking Confirm triggers the original action
